air-fryer-bbq-cheddar-stuffed-chicken-br.name: Air Fryer Bbq Cheddar-stuffed Chicken Breasts

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 193°C (190 degrees C). Cook 1 strip of bacon in the air fryer for 2 minutes. Remove from air fryer and cut into small pieces. Line the air fryer basket with parchment paper and increase the temperature to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Combine cooked bacon, Cheddar cheese, and 1 tablespoon barbeque sauce in a bowl.

Use a long, sharp knife to make a horizontal 1-inch cut at the top of each chicken breast, creating a small internal pouch. Stuff each breast equally with bacon-cheese mixture. Wrap remaining strips of bacon around each chicken breast. Coat chicken breast with remaining barbecue sauce and place into the prepared air fryer basket.

Cook for 10 minutes in the air fryer, turn, and continue cooking until chicken is no longer pink in the center and the juices run clear, about 10 more minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).

air-fryer-muffins-pequerecetas.name: Air Fryer Muffins

ingredients.item: 1 sobre de levadura en polvo (16 gr)
100 gr de  pepitas de chocolate( opcional )
Moldes para muffins de silicona o papel grueso

instructions: We have been pressurizing air frying for 5 minutes at 150 and 3 minutes. Meanwhile in a large bowl we beat the yogurt with the eggs and the sugar to have a consistent mass.
We toss the flour and the powder yeast and add it to the dough. We finally put an end to the oil and mix everything with care till it's incorporated.
Once all the well mixed ingredients are in the mass we add chocolate nuggets and we also mix them with care with the rest of the mass. We can put a few aside to add later.

We divide the mass into muffin mold, trying to get them all to have the same quantity. If we have booked some chocolate nuggets we can add them up now. At the air fryer we recommend using some Silicone muffin mold as these as they are reusable and easy to clear. You can also use more thick and tougher paper mold as we have been using them, these do not deform and can be put into the frying air without mold.

Once the air frying has been preheated, we carefully place the muffins inside the frying bucket, leaving enough space with them. Depending on the size of your fryer you will have to do some more, or reduce the quantity by half if you want to do few muffins. At our frying place, the Cecotec Cecopry Advance Double, place 8 muffins between the two cubets and so we did them in two pits.

We program the air fryer for 3 minutes at 150. After this time we check if the muffins are made by inserting a stick into one of the muffins and checking if remains of mass come out. If the stick goes clear our muffins are ready, if we see some dough come out we can extend the baking for another one or two minutes till the stick goes clear.

air-fried-bang-bang-salmon.name: Air-fried Bang Bang Salmon
instructions: Prepare sauce by whisking mayonnaise, chili sauce, and Sriracha together in a small bowl until well blended.
Spread 1 tablespoon sauce over the top of each salmon fillet. Reserve remaining sauce for serving.
Lightly coat the air fryer basket with cooking spray. Place fillets in the air fryer basket with the sauce facing up.
Air-fry until salmon flakes easily with a fork, about 10 minutes.
To serve, drizzle salmon with extra sauce and sprinkle green onion over top.

al-cantunzeins-pappardelle-with-sausage-.name: Al Cantunzein’s Pappardelle With Sausage And Peppers

ingredients.prep: rolled out thin and cut into wide noodles, or dried store-bought pappardelle, rigatoni, or shells

instructions: Peel the peppers, remove the core and seeds, and cut into 1-inch squares.
Peel and finely chop the onion. Put it with the olive oil in a 12-inch skillet over medium-high heat. Sauté until the onion turns to a rich golden color, about 5 minutes.

Remove the casing from the sausage. Add the sausage to the skillet and break it into small chunks with a wooden spoon.  Once the sausage is lightly browned, 2 to 3 minutes, add the peppers, season lightly with salt, and continue cooking until they are lightly colored, 6 to 8 minutes.

While the peppers are cooking, peel and coarsely chop the tomatoes. When the peppers are ready, add the tomatoes to the skillet. Season with salt and continue cooking until the tomatoes are no longer watery, 15 to 20 minutes.

While the tomatoes are cooking, fill a pot for the pasta with about 6 quarts of water, place over high heat, and bring to a boil. When the tomatoes are ready and the water is boiling, add 2 Tbsp. salt to the pot, drop in the pasta, and stir until all the strands are submerged. Cook until al dente. Drain will, toss with the tomato sauce along with the butter and Parmigiano-Reggiano, and serve at once.

almond-cake-cannoli-trifle.name: Almond Cake Cannoli Trifle
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour a 10-inch fluted tube pan (such as Bundt).

Combine cake mix, water, eggs, pudding mix, and almond extract in a bowl. Blend on low with an electric mixer until moistened. Increase speed to medium and blend about 2 minutes more. Pour into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, 40 to 45 minutes. Cool in the pan for 25 minutes; transfer cake to cooling rack.
Combine ricotta cheese, 1 cup confectioners' sugar, white sugar, and vanilla extract in a bowl. Whip cannoli cream until smooth using an electric mixer.

Beat heavy cream in a chilled glass or metal bowl with an electric mixer until foamy. Add 1/4 cup confectioners' sugar and 1 teaspoon vanilla extract at a time to achieve desired sweetness, continuing to beat until cream is stiff.

Transfer cooled cake to a cutting board and cut into small, bite-size pieces. Arrange 1 layer of cake pieces to cover the bottom of a trifle bowl. Top with a layer of chocolate chips and the cannoli cream. Continue with layers until bowl is nearly full; top with the whipped cream and chocolate chips.

and-original-halloween-canapes-for-parti.name: And Original Halloween Canapes For Parties
and-original-halloween-canapes-for-parti.original_name: Canapés de Halloween fáciles y originales para fiestas

ingredients.item: 1 paquete de obleas para empanadillas (o masa quebrada casera si prefieres)
200 g de salsa de tomate frito

instructions: We start by preheating the oven at 180 ° C. While it's picking up temperature, we put the wafers in the tipstick mold previously.
With a spoon put a good cape of fried tomato sauce at the bottom of every tipstick. Then you add a pint of oregano.
Para que parezcan ojos, corta unas cuantas aceitunas negras en rodajas. Reserva.
We get the mozzarella cheese and we distribute it through the tomato base and make fine lines and leave some of the tomato in sight. Finally, put the halves of black olive, that will be the eyes.
The bawks about 12- 15 minutes, till the cheese's broken and the doradite dough.

andes-mint-cookies.name: Andes® Mint Cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease 2 baking sheets.
Beat butter, white sugar, and brown sugar together in a bowl until smooth and creamy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat in vanilla extract.

Whisk flour, baking powder, and salt together in a bowl. Gradually add flour mixture to butter mixture until dough is just-combined. Transfer dough to a resealable plastic bag, squeeze out excess air, and seal bag. Refrigerate until dough firms, at least 2 hours.
Divide dough into 42 portions and wrap 1 dough portion around 1 mint. Repeat with remaining dough portions. Place dough 2-inches apart on prepared baking sheets.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges of cookies are golden, 10 to 12 minutes.

Melt remaining chocolate mint candies in a microwave-safe glass or ceramic bowl in 30-second intervals in the microwave, stirring after each melting, for 1 to 3 minutes. Drizzle melted mint chocolate over cookies.

appetizer-of-crispy-fried-beans-with-sal.name: Appetizer Of Crispy Fried Beans With Salt
appetizer-of-crispy-fried-beans-with-sal.original_name: Aperitivo de habas fritas crujientes con sal
instructions: Put the dried beans into a large bowl with cold water and let them soak for 24 to 36 hours. The aim is for the beans to be rehydrated sufficiently so they can be easily pitted.
Una vez remojadas, pela las habas. Tras el pelado, separa las habas en dos partes para prepararlas para la fritura.

In a large frying pan, heats abundant oil at medium-high heat. Be sure that the oil's hot and hot before starting frying to achieve a crispy and golden result. Add peeling beans to hot oil, frying them with tands to prevent them from bouncing and unevenly cooking. It allows the beans to cold until they gain a golden tone and crisp texture. It occasionally removes to ensure a uniform cooking. Remove frying beans from frying pan and place them on absorbing paper to remove excess oil. That step was crucial to ensuring that the beans remained crispy without being oil. While the beans are still hot, sprinkle salt to suit them.
appetizer-of-crispy-fried-beans-with-sal.category: Recetas de Aperitivos, Tapas y Pinchos

apple-cake-with-almonds-teleculinaria.name: Apple Cake With Almonds
instructions: Garnish with butter and sprinkle with flour a shape without hole. Cut the apples in half, peel them and peel them. Reserve.
In a bowl, beat the butter with sugar. Add the eggs, one by one and beat very well between each addition. Finally, involve flour, grated almond and baking powder.

Lay the dough in shape and, above, dispose of the apple halves. Take it in the oven, preheated at 180°C, for about 25 to 30 minutes. When removed from the oven, sprinkle with roasted rolled almonds. Unform and serve.

apple-cheesecake.name: Apple Cheesecake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
To make the crust: Mix graham cracker crumbs, pecans, melted butter, sugar, and cinnamon together in a bowl until well combined.
Press the graham cracker mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes. Remove from the oven; leave the oven on.

To make the filling: Beat cream cheese and sugar in a mixing bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat in vanilla extract. Pour filling into the baked crust.
To make the topping: Place apples in a bowl. Stir sugar and cinnamon together in a smaller bowl; pour over apples and toss to coat. Spoon sugared apples over filling, then sprinkle pecans over top.

Bake in the oven until edges are puffed, 60 to 70 minutes. Run the tip of a table knife around the edges of the pan, set the pan on a wire rack, and allow the cheesecake to cool at room temperature, about 1 hour. Refrigerate until completely chilled, 4 hours to overnight.

apricot-complimentary-lezzet.name: Apricot Complimentary
instructions: 1. Wash dry apricots and take it in a pot.
2. U add water to the car and keep the inflatables in for a fewh.
3. Add sugar and almonds.
4. Cook until boiling.
5. Serve cold.

aromatic-white-rice.name: Aromatic White Rice

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Heat 3 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a heavy medium saucepan over medium. Add 1 medium onion, finely chopped, 3 garlic cloves, finely chopped, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Cook, stirring often, until onion is softened, 5–7 minutes. Add 1 bay leaf and 3 cups long-grain white rice, rinsed; cook, stirring, until grains are coated in oil, about 30 seconds.

Pour in 4½ cups low-sodium chicken broth and stir once. Bring to a boil, then cover and reduce heat to low. Cook until rice is tender and liquid is absorbed, 15–20 minutes. Remove from heat, uncover, and let sit to allow excess moisture to evaporate, 5–10 minutes.
Fluff rice with a fork; pluck out and discard bay leaf. Transfer to a shallow bowl to serve.

asian-pork-tenderloin-packets.name: Asian Pork Tenderloin Packets
instructions: Preheat oven to 232°C or grill to medium-high.
Center one-fourth of pork slices, broccoli, carrots, water chestnuts, bell pepper and onions evenly on a sheet of Reynolds Wrap® Aluminum Foil.
Mix sweet and sour sauce, stir fry sauce, sesame oil and ginger in a small bowl; spoon evenly over pork and vegetables.
Bring up foil sides. Double fold top and ends to seal packet, leaving room for heat circulation inside. Repeat to make four packets.
If freezing, place packets in Hefty® Slider Bags. Label bags with permanent marker. Freeze till ready to thaw and cook.
Place frozen packets in refrigerator to thaw for 10 to 12 hours.
Place thawed packets on baking sheet to cook in oven or transport to grill.
Bake 20 to 22 minutes in oven OR GRILL 15 to 16 minutes in covered grill, till pork reaches 71°C and vegetables are crisp-tender. Serve with rice and more sauce, if desired.

aunt-bills-brown-candy.name: Aunt Bill's Brown Candy
instructions: Butter a 9x13-inch dish and a medium, heavy saucepan.
Combine 4 cups sugar and cream in the buttered saucepan. Set aside.
Pour remaining 2 cups sugar in a large heavy skillet over medium heat. Cook, stirring constantly, until sugar begins to melt.
Place the saucepan with sugar and cream over low heat, stirring occasionally.

Continue to cook and stir sugar in the skillet until completely melted and light brown. Pour melted sugar very slowly, in a thin stream, into the lightly simmering cream, stirring constantly. This step may take about 5 minutes, and works best if someone pours the melted sugar very slowly.

Heat, without stirring, to 242 to 120°C (116 to 120 degrees C), or until a small amount of syrup dropped into cold water forms a firm but pliable ball. Remove from heat and stir in baking soda (mixture will foam). Drop the butter into the foaming mixture and let rest without stirring for 30 minutes.

Stir in vanilla with a wooden spoon and continue to stir vigorously until mixture loses its gloss, 10 to 15 minutes. Then fold in pecans and quickly turn candy into the prepared 9x13-inch dish. Let cool until just warm and cut into 1-inch pieces.

avocado-pate-recipe-comedera.name: Retirement pate receipt
avocado-pate-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de paté de aguacate fácil
instructions: Cut and remove the seed from the avocado.
With the help of a spoon, remove the pulp from the avocado and put into a blender.
It incorporates natural yogurt, lemon juice, olive oil, cilantro, salt and pepper to aste.
It processes slightly till everything gets integrated and looks good and crema.
Retirement of salt and pepper if necessary.
Inputs pate into an airtight and refrigerates into the refrigerator for about 30 minutes to be settled.
After that time, you'll be ready to enjoy.
